title: DoubleSlabMining
description: Split double slabs into singles with precision breaking.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The DoubleSlabMining plugin allows players to break double slabs into their single slab components based on the precise location of their hit. By detecting whether a player aims at the top or bottom half of a double slab, the plugin adjusts the block’s structure, turning it into a single slab and dropping the corresponding item. This functionality is ideal for builders, creative users, or survival players who want more granular control over their slab placements. [Here is a detailed description of the plugin’s features and functionality.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/43)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
